I want to buy a virtual number in Thailand to receive text messages.

That's great! To help you better, could you please let me know if you're looking for a specific type of virtual number, such as a personal or business number? Additionally, do you have any preferences for the service provider or features you'd like the number to have?

It sounds like you're having trouble finding a virtual number in Thailand. Could you let me know which service or platform you are using to search for the virtual number? That way, I can provide more specific assistance!

hello
Hi Elsa, how may I help you?
I want to buy a local Thai number (+66) to receive text messages.
However, it shows that no matching number was found.
currently we only have Hong Kong number to receive SMS from other countries
unfortunately we don't have a Thai number
We offer virtual number and it's slightly different from mobile sim card
Do you have virtual numbers from Thailand?
Can it be used to register for Shopee?
yes, DID number can be used for outbound and inbound call.
is there any verificaiton process for shopee? if it's call verification, then yes
Shopee has an SMS verification step.
then cannot use Thai number.
our Thai virtual number cannot support SMS verificaiton
Can it only accept incoming and outgoing phone calls?
yes, can only recieve calls or make calls
by the way, for the region field, you need to fill in the country of the number you request for
If you'd like to purchase the number, please complete the application and we will review in 2 working days.

(Private) Good morning, Sandy.

As we confirmed with Brian before.
we have Thai Virtual Numbers that can send and receive SMS. 🙏
(Private) But maybe we need to update our IPP and add Thai Virtual Numbers so the customer can order online.
(Private) Let me check with Brian
(Private) thanks
(Private) if we have one, then I will send an email to the customer
(Private) Thank you so much
